Ozzy Banks
About

About

Hi, I’m Ozzy. I made this website so I could log on to Goodreads, but now that you’re here…

Check out Cultivation Fever Volume 1 on Amazon. Volume 2 coming soon!

If you’re a writer, check out the LSFA Almanac. No, there’s no almanac right now, but if you submit to the London theme… there might be!

Finally, my Discord. If you’re a fan, that’s where the fans are. If you’d like to help moderate, please do get in touch: ozzybanksauthor@gmail.com

Happy browsing!
